title: Fidacy UCP Trust-Verdict Signal value (v1)
description: The value placed under the `com.fidacy.trust_verdict` key inside a UCP `signals` object (ucp.dev/schemas/shopping/types/signals.json). A verifiable third-party attestation: the compact EdDSA `jws` is the source of truth; the other fields are convenience hints until the JWS is verified.

format.description: Media type of the signed verdict.

jws.description: The compact EdDSA JWS (three base64url segments joined by '.'), independently verifiable against the public JWKS. Source of truth.

kid.description: The signing key id; matches the `did:web:fidacy.com#<kid>` issuer and the JWKS entry.

provider_jwks.description: Public JWKS URL where the signing key is published (key discovery for the verifier).

payload.description: Decoded verdict claims, provided for convenience. Decoders MUST treat the verified `jws` contents as authoritative, not this field.
